---
title: Check QC plots for MB multiome data
date: 2025-02-04
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To generate QC plots and UMAPs from the Taylor lab MB tumour dataset.


## Files and directories

### Code

The code can be found in `<tumour multiome software directory>/check_qc_metrics.R` and all code was run using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment.

All input data are loaded from `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/projects/MB_multiome`. Only the samples found in the JSON file (from Gabrielle Persad) were loaded and had plots generated.

### Output

The output can be found in `<tumour multiome results directory>/20240204/`.

- `qc_plots` contains the QC metric plots for each of the samples
- `umaps` contains the original UMAPs for each of the samples


## Results

![QC metrics for the Taylor lab MB tumour multiome samples (n = 60). All samples appear to have already been filtered to remove low quality cells.](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/MB_multiome/20250204/qc_plots/all_samples.png){#fig-qc}

![Example of UMAPs for one of the multiome samples. UMAPs for all samples were already present in the RDS files.](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/MB_multiome/20250204/umaps/HSMB0002_orig_umaps.png){#fig-sample-umap}
